description.value:
The classic fighting staff of soldiers, monks, and wanderers. Wielded with both hands, it delivers rapid two-ended strikes and can trip an opponent in an instant. Masters use it defensively as well as offensively.

Training Levels

LevelProperties
UntrainedTwo-Handed, Melee d6, Bludgeoning
BasicTwo-Handed, Melee d8, Double Ended d6, Bludgeoning, Trip
MasterTwo-Handed, Melee d8, Double Ended d6, Bludgeoning, Trip, defensive stance
Master PerkYou gain +1 to AC while wielding this weapon. When you attack a creature more than 5 feet away (using Reach or Double Ended), the damage die becomes a d10.

rmeData.masterPerk: +1 to AC while wielding. When attacking a creature more than 5 feet away, the damage die becomes a d10.
